g.text: ESM external validation converts source shift into a safety eligibility audit

text.style: font-size: 10px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #52616b

g.text: The evidence chain documents public strong-motion provenance, derived nonlinear response reconstruction, and the margin-controlled false-safe decision surface.
